title: Jujutsu Kaisen Fans Rank Gojo Satoru 2nd Among the Strongest (No. 1 Raises Eyebrows)
content: One of the most popular aspects of Jujutsu Kaisen is its enigmatic, cheerful, and charming sorcerer, Gojo Satoru. The blue-eyed sorcerer has captivated fans in many ways; however, one of the biggest reasons for his popularity is his strength.
author: ComicBook

title: flat's Natsu Aogiri Launches New Manga
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for Mag Garden 's Mag Comi platform announced on Tuesday that flat manga artist Natsu Aogiri will launch a new series titled Enyakurukuru on the platform on April 21. The story follows the strange connection between a fragile high school boy and a suspicious young man.
author: ANN

title: 20 Years Later, This Is Still Cartoon Network’s Wildest Spinoff (& It Never Aired in the U.S.)
content: Cartoon Network is now celebrating the 20th anniversary for the wildest spinoff the channel has ever helped to produce, and it’s an anime that didn’t even get an official broadcast run in the United States after all this time.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Crunchyroll Isekai Suddenly Cancels Future Episode Release
content: One of the major Isekai anime franchises now airing its newest season with Crunchyroll has suddenly cancelled plans for a future episode coming later this May. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in full effect as fans have gotten to see all kinds of new episodes from some of their favorite franchises .
author: ComicBook

title: The King of the Dead at the Dark Palace Light Novels Get Manga
content: The May issue of Square Enix 's Shonen Gangan magazine confirmed on Saturday that Tsukikage 's The King of the Dead at the Dark Palace light novels has received a manga adaptation by Ishura artist Meguri on the Gangan Online platform in April. The series debuted on April 7.
author: ANN

title: Haikyu Returns With New Live-Action Adaptation Announcement
content: When it comes to live-action anime adaptations, this period in time seems to be the golden age for endeavors in this field. Netflix’s One Piece has hit new heights, with its third season currently in development, while other franchises like Mobile Suit Gundam, One-Punch Man, My Hero Academia , and Naruto all have…
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s One Piece Exec Teases Season 3’s Biggest Live-Action Debut
content: One Piece is now in the works on its third season of the live-action series with Netflix , and one of the showrunners behind it all is teasing the biggest new character we’ll get in the Alabasta arc.
author: ComicBook

title: Black Channel Manga Gets TV Anime
content: The official X/Twitter account for Shogakukan 's Coro Coro Comics magazine announced on Wednesday that Satoshi Kisaichi 's Black Channel manga is getting a television anime. The account shared a commemorative illustration: Kisaichi launched the manga in Coro Coro Comics in 2020 and the series is ongoing.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Finale Fight Was Originally Much Longer Before Changes
content: It turns out the final fight in Jujutsu Kaisen ‘s third season was originally planned to be much longer before it was changed according to one of the stars behind it all. Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 had some massive episodes on offer thanks to the first phase of the Culling Game tournament, and the final episode of the…
author: ComicBook

title: Classroom of the Elite Season 4 Anime's English Dub Streams 1st 4 Episodes on April 15
content: The English cast, which features returning members, includes: • Justin Briner as Ayanokoji • Felecia Angelle as Suzune • Tia Ballard as Amasawa • Jennifer Alyx as Chabashira • Alex Moore as Hasebe • Austin Tindle as Hashimoto • Dallas Reid as Hirata • Veronica Laux as Hiyori • Bradley Gareth as Hosen • Jamie Marchi as…
author: ANN
